confirmDeleteDescription: Ma hubtaa inaad tirtiri doonto noocan qandaraaska? Waxqabadkani dib looma celin karo.

validation.nameRequired: Magaca nooca qandaraaska waa loo baahan yahay

toasts.createSuccess: Nooca qandaraaska si guul leh ayaa loo abuuray
toasts.updateSuccess: Nooca qandaraaska si guul leh ayaa loo cusboonaysiiyay
toasts.deleteSuccess: Nooca qandaraaska si guul leh ayaa loo tirtiray
toasts.error: Waxaa dhacay qalad inta lagu jiray hawsha
